alt: Secretarybird utilizing its powerful long crane-like legs to forcefully stomp on prey
caption: Standing around 1.3 meters (4.3 feet) tall, they use their powerful crane-like legs to deliver blindingly fast, bone-breaking kicks to dispatch tough prey.
acquisitionNotes: Breathtaking 5472x3648 dynamic shot demonstrating legendary stomping force and leg morphology. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/d/d8/Day_33_Secretarybird_%28Sagittarius_serpentarius%29_stomping_on_locust_..._%2853589310638%29.jpg
